about.title: About
about.subtitle: Antônio Lanza — Full Stack developer in Passo Fundo, specialized in modern web applications ready for production.
about.heading: Software that drives business.
about.description1: I'm Antônio Lanza, a Full Stack developer based in Passo Fundo, Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil. I build complete web applications, high-conversion landing pages, APIs, and custom systems, combining performance, scalability, and an excellent user experience.
about.description2: I work with companies in Passo Fundo, across Rio Grande do Sul, and remote clients. My experience includes platforms, ERPs, and B2B solutions for recruitment, business management, animal nutrition, and industrial weighing — always focused on software ready to grow with the business.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: The stack I use in my day-to-day work

items.title: Talentista
items.description: SaaS ERP for recruitment and selection used in production. I'm responsible for full stack development of the platform, building new features, evolving the architecture, and maintaining the entire system operation.
highlights: Operational interface development with React and Material UI.
REST APIs in Flask with PostgreSQL for job postings, candidates, hiring processes, contracts, finance, and billing.
Dashboard with Kanban, metrics, and portals for clients and candidates.
Automated generation of assessments, reports, and resumes in PDF.
JWT authentication system with role-based permission control.
Technical and behavioral tests with campaigns and exclusive links per candidate.

items.title: SN250
items.eyebrow: Full Stack · Feedlot & Animal Nutrition ERP
items.description: System used in feedlot management, built to control the entire nutritional operation of the herd — from diet planning to feeding execution and performance analysis.
highlights: FastAPI development for business rules and integrations.
Management of diets, batches, ingredients, inventory, weighings, and loads.
Dashboard with zootechnical indicators, costs, and consumption per batch.
Feeding planning with visual editor and dry matter control.
Integration with scales, RFID, and field equipment.
Multi-tenant architecture using PostgreSQL, Redis, and Docker.

items.title: SN800
items.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for forestry weighing operations, built to centralize registrations, operational monitoring, reports, and real-time integration with scales.
highlights: Application development in Next.js with PT/EN/ES support.
Institutional landing page and platform admin panel.
REST API with Route Handlers for registrations, dashboards, reports, and administration.
Multi-tenant architecture on Supabase with RLS and role-based access control.
Edge Functions for weighing ingestion with validation and idempotency.
Management of scales, equipment, trucks, materials, and operations.
